lines.speaker: Phillipa
lines.text: Hi, I'm Phillipa, Juliet's cousin. I like to keep an eye on her, make sure that dashing young Romeo doesn't just steal her away under our plain old noses!

lines.speaker: Phillipa
lines.text: He'd do it, you know - he's ever so dashing, and cavalier, in a wet blanket sort of way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Romeo? Where would I find him then?

lines.speaker: Phillipa
lines.text: Well, that's a good question! Who knows where his head's at most of the time? In the clouds, most likely!

lines.speaker: Phillipa
lines.text: But he's probably chasing the ladies who frequent Varrock market. He does like a bit of kiss chase, so I've heard!

lines.speaker: Phillipa
lines.text: Hello, I seem to be getting on really well with that dashing lovely dovely, Romeo. Pity about poor Juliet - she missed out there I reckon!
